task_completion.visual_evidence: eQUEST main window is open with '4StoreyBuilding' visible in the title bar or project tree.

task_completion.description: Create a new door construction with a U-value of 0.40.
task_completion.visual_evidence: eQUEST Construction Properties or Door Properties dialog showing a construction assigned to the door with a U-value of 0.40 (acceptable range 0.38-0.42).

task_completion.description: Add a door to the Ground Floor South exterior wall.
task_completion.visual_evidence: eQUEST Component Tree or Door Properties showing a door attached to a Ground Floor South wall (look for parent components with 'G' prefix and 'S' suffix, e.g., G.S11).

task_completion.description: Set the door dimensions to 6 ft width and 7 ft height.
task_completion.visual_evidence: eQUEST Door Properties dialog showing Width = 6 (or 6.0) and Height = 7 (or 7.0).
eQUEST simulation dialog box showing calculation progress or a 'Simulation Complete' message.
Agent clicking 'File -> Save', clicking the floppy disk save icon, or a save confirmation dialog.

integrity.description: Agent used the eQUEST GUI to modify the building model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with eQUEST dialog boxes (e.g., Door Properties, Construction Properties) rather than a text editor.

integrity.description: Simulation was executed within the eQUEST application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard eQUEST simulation progress window or completion dialog is visible, not a mocked terminal output.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the .inp file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) being used to manually type in the door specifications or U-values into the .inp file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target building model is '4StoreyBuilding'. Ground Floor spaces use a 'G' prefix and South-facing surfaces use an 'S' suffix (e.g., G.S11). The new door must have dimensions of 6.0 ft width and 7.0 ft height. The new door construction must have a U-value of 0.40 ± 0.02 Btu/(h·ft²·°F). Note: The task description states there are no doors on the south facade, but the base file actually contains an existing door at (G.S11.E1.D1) with dimensions 5.5x6.5. The agent must either modify this existing door or create a new one with the specified 6x7 dimensions and 0.40 U-value. The project is saved at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\eQUEST 3-65 Projects\4StoreyBuilding\4StoreyBuilding.inp.
